articles.title: Shortlisted for an Oscar, 'Homebound' is a daring movie about two dear friends - NPR
articles.description: The movie, now streaming on Netflix, defied current trends in Indian cinema to tell the true story of a friendship between a Muslim and a Hindu Dalit. Martin Scorsese was secretly involved.
articles.content: DEVARI, India The legendary Martin Scorsese was the movie's executive producer although his role was kept secret to ensure the film crew could keep working without attracting media attention. He was … [+8631 chars]
